title: Login / Registration Checklist
items: Verify that user can open the login page
Verify that user can log in with valid email and password
Verify validation for empty email field
Verify validation for empty password field
Verify validation for invalid email format
Verify error message for incorrect password
Verify that password is hidden by default
Verify show/hide password button if it exists
Verify that user can log out
Verify registration with already used email
Verify required fields on registration form

title: Search Checklist
items: Verify that search results are relevant
Verify that search results can be opened
Verify that search input can be cleared
Verify search performance for common queries

title: Cart Checklist
items: Verify that user can add product to cart
Verify that cart counter updates after adding product
Verify that user can open cart
Verify that product name, price and quantity are displayed correctly
Verify that user can increase product quantity
Verify that user can decrease product quantity
Verify that user can remove product from cart
Verify that total price is recalculated correctly
Verify that cart data is saved after page reload

title: Checkout Checklist
items: Verify that user can open checkout page
Verify error handling when required data is missing

title: API Testing Checklist
items: Verify status code for successful request
Verify validation for empty request body
Verify validation for invalid field values
Verify authentication if endpoint requires token

title: Forms Validation Checklist
items: Verify that errors disappear after valid input

title: Mobile App Checklist
items: Verify app stability after repeated actions
